item.title: Beauty & Health Deals: Best Picks Under £20 — Guide
item.description: Discover 14 top beauty & health bargains under £20 on eBay UK — creams, oils, pads and more with tips on prices, condition and shipping. Shop smart now.

item.title: Best Beauty & Health Buys: Top £9–£20 eBay Picks Guide
item.description: Top beauty & health picks on eBay UK — creams, pads, oils and sleep aid under £20, with condition, sizes and care tips to help you buy smart. Shop now.
